changes.before: ethanol reacts with another molecule of HI and is converted to ethyl iodide.\begin{array}{c}\overbrace{\mathrm{CH_3CH_2-O-H}}^{\mathrm{CH_3}}+\mathrm{H_2O}\xrightarrow{\mathrm{H_2O}}\mathrm{CH_3CH_2-O}\xrightarrow{\mathrm{H_4}}\mathrm{H_2O}\\\overbrace{\mathrm{H_4+CH_2-OH_2}}^{\mathrm{CH_3}}+\mathrm{H_2O}\xrightarrow{\mathrm{CH_2-O}}\mathrm{CH_3CH_2+H_2O}\end{array}
changes.after: ethanol reacts with another molecule of HI and is converted to ethyl iodide.\begin{array}{c}\overbrace{\mathrm{CH_3CH_2-O-H}}^{\mathrm{CH_3}}+\mathrm{H_2O}\xrightarrow{\mathrm{H_2O}}\mathrm{CH_3CH_2-O}\xrightarrow{\mathrm{H_4}}\mathrm{H_2O}\\overbrace{\mathrm{H_4+CH_2-OH_2}}^{\mathrm{CH_3}}+\mathrm{H_2O}\xrightarrow{\mathrm{CH_2-O}}\mathrm{CH_3CH_2+H_2O}\end{array}

reasons: pathological brace/bracket nesting depth (unrecoverable OCR garbage)
